subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the sacred fragrances! Two or three letters, both detailed and brief, have thus far been dispatched and received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب نفحات قدس تا بحال دو سه مکتوب مفصل و مختصر ارسال گردیده و رسیده و
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual transformation, @courtesy; culture [adab], @contention and conflict
